reviews.title: Good solution
reviews.text: Was worried about heat since the external drive I keep in this is used for gaming, but it works well.  Gave me an option to get the hdd off the desk.

reviews.title: Just what we needed
reviews.text: Love this idea! Bought 2….very happy with this purchase.

reviews.title: Stretches out of shape easily.
reviews.text: Serves the purpose. Neoprene is very thin. Stretches out of shape easily. Okay if you avoid taking things in and out.

reviews.title: Gets the job done
reviews.text: The adhesion is great! The pouch is very stretchy. Too stretchy for me. My hard drive will slip out of tipped toward the opening. Not worth trying to take it off, since I'm just careful to not tip it opening side down. But I wish it was a little more snug.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Attached easy and no peeling off. Very roomy and accommodating

title: COO Wireless Mouse, LED Slim Dual Mode(Bluetooth 5.1 and 2.4G Wireless) Rechargeable Led Wireless Mouse with 3 Adjustable DPI for iPad OS 13, MacBook, Laptop, Mac OS 10.10
features: 【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by simply toggle switching.It can connecting one device through Bluetooth and the other through 2.4GHz USB Receiver. Note: You can't use Bluetooth mode and 2.4G mode at the same time.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries.To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【WIDE COMPATIBILITY】2.4GHz mode works with laptop, desktop or any device with USB port, simply plug the USB receiver and play directly. Bluetooth mode works with Windows/ Android/ MAC OS system. 【NOTE: BT5.1System Requirement: Windows 8.0, Windows 10 or later; MacOSX 10.10 or later; iPad OS 13 or later/ Android 5.0 or later. Please check or update the operating system before using

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【PORTABLE & POCKET SIZE】Lightweight, slim design make it perfectly for travel, easy to put in your laptop bag or pockets.

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text: Love this wireless mouse. The plug is in the mouse! That's GREAT. Can't get lost. Love it!

reviews.title: Just what I needed.
reviews.text: Pretty cool little mouse. Unfortunately the red light for the actual mouse essentially over powers the LED lights. They're barely seen behind the bright red. Otherwise it does what it needs.

reviews.title: Can be recharged
reviews.text: Does not require batteries. Can be recharged.  Excellent feature if you are tired of replacing batteries all the time.  Pretty color. Ergonomic.

reviews.title: Don’t bother!

Just enuf to NOT BE RETURNABLE!
unacceptable!!!

reviews.title: Come on!
reviews.text: Was not responding to anything.  New battery, new computer,  new usb...sheesh!!  So cute and as you read, I tried my hardest to get it to work.

reviews.title: A Good Buy!
reviews.text: Cute and it works well..  The on/off switch is very small--only complaint.  A Good Buy !

reviews.title: boss enjoyed it for the 3 or so months it worked
reviews.text: Gag gift, boss enjoyed it for the 3 or so months it worked. It did stop working even after fresh batteries.

reviews.title: Nice looking but.....
reviews.text:
This mouse looks like the picture. the USB neatly stores into the bottom of the car.
What I didn't like about it is:
1. One of the wheels has rough edges and where the battery fits is also a rough edge. They catch on my mouse pad, a lot.
Only one of the wheels move. If they all did, I think it would make the mouse smoother when you are working with it.
I didn't use it in time to return it so I am stuck with it. I think I may have to try and file it down.

reviews.title: Got lot of compliments and likes for the shape and ...
reviews.text: Got lot of compliments and likes for the shape and looks but I bought this in April of this year and now in September 30 it has quit working, I expected it to work at the least a year

reviews.title: Neither hard, nor fit

reviews.title: I use this four days a week and it is perfect.

I use this to carry my favorite mouse from home to work and back again four days a week. It's perfect. There's nothing wrong with it. I highly recommend it.
Update June 4, 2022, this mouse case is still perfect! Money well spent!

reviews.title: Love this mouse

reviews.title: Classy styling; good fit; great price.

title: Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor FHD 1920 x 1080 Computer Monitor, 75 Hertz, 5 MS, Dual Monitor, Wireless Keyboard and Wireless Mouse, VESA, VGA and HDMI Monitor, Basic Monitor and Gaming Monitor – 2 Pack
features: High-Quality Visuals - The Packard Bell airFrame 24 is equipped with a 1920 x 1080p resolution, this monitor delivers crisp and clear visuals that are great for both gaming and office use.

Fast Refresh Rate and Response Time - With a 75 hertz refresh rate and a 5 ms response time, the Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor provides a smooth and seamless experience, making it perfect for gamers and anyone who needs a fast and responsive display.
VESA Mount Compatible – The airFrame 24 is compatible with VESA mounts, which allows you to easily mount it on a wall or a monitor arm for a more ergonomic setup.
Adjustable Stand - The stand is adjustable, with a 5 degree forward tilt and a 15 degree backward tilt, making it easy to find the most comfortable viewing angle.

Wide Viewing Angle - The airFrame 24 has a 178 degree viewing angle, which ensures that the display looks great from almost any angle, making it perfect for students who need to share their screen with others. Plus, it's compatible with PC, Xbox, and PS5, making it a versatile option for any setup.

reviews.title: Great price for this two pack
reviews.text: I was really impressed with how well these monitors were packed for shipment. They arrived quickly and were better quality than expected.

reviews.title: Value of the product
reviews.text: It was nice to get two 24" monitors for the price of one. It greatly helps by increasing the amount of screen I have to work with and the picture quality is phenomenal.

reviews.title: great monitor for the price
reviews.text: A great value and more importantly an excellent monitor.  I like the narrow edge border as it provides more space than my previous monitor without sacrificing screen space.  I like the clarity, no dead pixels, and less blue light issues.  very satisfied.

reviews.title: Easy to view and use.
reviews.text: I'm enjoying my first extended screen and found it quite intuitive. The colors are bright and the 24" size is great for a smaller setup. The screen can tip up and down but it does not rotate. No problem for me.

reviews.title: I couldn’t be happier perfect picture!
reviews.text: Great color and clarity!!!!

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
It's the best wireless mouse I have used so far, and the price was reasonable. It does have a tendency to skip around if the battery starts to get low of if it's not really close to my laptop. It does work, it fits nicely in my hand and it feels sturdy. I've had others that felt as if they would shatter if just dropped on the carpet.

Comfort - Great
Price - Fair
Battery life - Okay
Sturdiness - Good
Good product overall

reviews.title: A good one, but could be better
reviews.text:
Pros:
- light weight, convenient
- works
- batteries last a long time
- price is low
- on/off button

Cons
- pointer is a bit too sensitive
- compared to wired mouse, precision can be improved
- the little stick is easily lost

reviews.title: good mouse, great blue color
reviews.text: Very good mouse, and I ove the dark blue color, and it goes great with the new Blue Swirl mousepad that I also got from Amazon!

reviews.title: Nice mid sized mouse
reviews.text:
So far so good.
Easy to use and setup.
Fits my hand comfortably.
Just got it, will update if anything goes wrong.

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

title: Cute Hamster Mouse,Wireless Mouse 2.4 Ghz 1200 DPI Less Noise Cartoon Animal Shape Portable Optical Mice with USB Receiver for Notebook Windows Computer PC Laptop Gift Kids(Gray)

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

reviews.title: Bought again
reviews.text: this mouse has everything i need it. i don’t need batteries, i can use by 2 device on a time , it can fold and the shape is very nice. good job 👍

reviews.title: Improvement over MS Arc mouse
reviews.text: Does not disconnect from laptop. Very responsive. On other hand it is rather poorly made, feels like it will fall apart at any minute.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: Super product. Great price.
reviews.text: Really responsive and not overly sensitive. Has been a great addition for tablet. Seamless connection didn’t loose once. Easy to navigate instructions for set up. Great battery life. Used for 7 hours consecutive without sign of needing charged.

reviews.title: Move along. Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Two months! Two months this mouse lasted, and that was with very light use. Fully charged, I was just scrolling with it when I felt the wheel break. It just stopped making the little clicky sound/feeling. No trauma, no misuse, just very very very cheaply made. I surrender. It's time to cough up the money and buy the Apple brand mouse for my MacBook. My sanity is at least worth the $60.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
After three previous tries, I finally got a Bluetooth mouse for my MacBook. I'm hoping this one is sturdier than the last I purchased that barely lasted six months. That remains to be seen, but given the product materials, I'm not hopeful. Making the connection after power-up or sleep mode is a little finicky. Also, a solid flat dark surface/mouse pad seems to be a prerequisite. Without it, the cursor is slow to respond or just does its own thing. I've never seen a mouse with the jitters before, but this one will cause the cursor to jiggle and twitch, even though the mouse itself it perfectly still, untouched. I've watched the cursor jitter clear off the screen. However, using a solid black mouse pad seems to have dealt with the problem. I would send it back and try a different product, but I've sent so many cheaply made and/or mislabeled mice back to Amazon in the past month, I've got return fatigue. We'll give this one a chance with the mousepad solution.

reviews.title: Won't hold a charge - must keep plugged in
reviews.text:
I've been through two of these. I returned/exchanged this first hoping it was just a defect. This mouse will only function appropriately for about 4-5 minutes tops if not directly plugged in to USB , otherwise it starts jumping/skipping/lagging etc. Plugged in it's perfect though - so if you get lucky and get one that holds a charge you'll probably be very happy with it. I just decided to keep this one and keep it plugged in. It's not ideal but it gets the job done.
I should probably mention that it is very easy to set up, basically plug and play - which was nice.

reviews.title: Flawless Bluetooth connectivity with Mac
reviews.text: My Logitech M310 (been using them for 10-15 years) could not connect properly with my USB-C/Thunderbolt MacBookPro, using their USB dongle, thru a USB adapter. Scroll wheel would NOT work, and Logitech tech support said they would not update drivers. 'Don't use an adapter.' But they aren't aware that new Macs don't have old-school USB ports? Anyone else have this problem?! Anyway... this Seenda connects directly with Bluetooth, and connects instantly. If it sleeps (after a few hours?) it wakes and re-connects with one click, in less than a second. I charged the battery when I bought it a few weeks ago, and forgot that I might need to charge it again one day. Still going. Downsides: it is much smaller and lighter than I am used to (the M310 is easily twice as thick/tall) so I am getting used to that. Took awhile to find the right DPI/resolution/speed (and the button to change that is in a precarious, easy-to-hit-by-mistake position. Overall a great recommend.

reviews.title: Wonderful mouse for the price!
reviews.text: I love this mouse! It fits perfectly in my hand, and the usb Bluetooth works great with no issues. The clicks are silent, but the scroller click is not silent. This is fine for me since I don’t use my scroller to click very often, but if that bothers you, I thought it was important to point out.

reviews.title: Lightweight and Responsive
reviews.text: This little mouse is nice and responsive. I really enjoy using it. It's comfortable, too. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
It’s super super lightweight and feels very cheap. It comes with no instructions what so ever. It comes with a little usb input and so I plug it into my Chromebook and put in one AA battery. I flip the switch to on and it starts glowing red. I don’t know what the red light means, again, no instructions. Are the batteries dead? Is it not connected? No idea.
I open up the Bluetooth menu and it’s scanning and nothing is coming up and then I realize the cursor is moving with the mouse. I start rolling it around and it has horrible traction. It’s not a smooth motion as you’d expect from a mouse. Again, maybe my batteries were low, maybe the connection was low, I can’t say, although I switched out the batteries about 3 times and I doubt all 3 batteries were close to dead. I bought this for my sons online homework that he has to do, it consist of a lot of dragging items to designated locations on the screen and he’s been having difficulty using the mouse pad on the Chromebook . But it’s so flimsy, my daughter picked it up and lost it amongst the mess of toys and I don’t even feel at a loss.

reviews.title: Sleek and Elegant
reviews.text: This Mouse is a perfect match for our white Cherry keyboard. It has all the basic functions you need without the fancy programable buttons that some gaming people use. We find it exacting in use when we do retouching in Photoshop and movements are precise, with the nano receiver, and fast all the time. This is a good basic mouse to use every day on any computer. It's attractive and fits your hand comfortably.

reviews.text: Small and comfortable. Easy to set up and use. Great value.

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.
